name: Juice Shop — XXE via libxml parseXml with noent:true on uploaded XML

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: XXE Data Access.

notes: Uploaded XML is parsed with libxml.parseXml(..., { noent: true }), which substitutes external entities — enabling XXE local-file disclosure (e.g. /etc/passwd) and SSRF. Fix sets noent:false to disable entity expansion.
